title: Plutarch, Moralia: Against the Stoics on Common Conceptions
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Against the Stoics on Common Conceptions.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Against the Stoics on Common Conceptions.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Against the Stoics on Common Conceptions': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
